variants.title: Filtrec WX303 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WX303. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WX303 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 295.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 225.0 mm, Length: 210.0 mm, Seal Material: Plastisol, Temperature Range: -30 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Plastisol
